title: melissa rupestris
intro: Melissa rupestris, also known as rock rose, is a perennial plant species of the family Lamiaceae, native to the Mediterranean region. It possesses medicinal properties due to its high concentration of volatile oils, particularly borneol and camphor. The health benefits of Melissa rupestris include its ability to soothe anxiety and insomnia, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Melissa rupestris can be found in teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to alleviate stress and promote relaxation.
